# Vesta Frontend Guidelines

## Product Context

Vesta Immo is a real estate simulation product for individuals.

For shared product context, terminology, and positioning, refer to:
https://github.com/Vesta-Immo/.github/blob/main/profile/README.md

Use this context when making frontend decisions about architecture, UX copy, UI components, forms, API integration, and QA priorities.

## Agent Guidance

- Prefer recommendations that improve comprehension, trust, and decision-making for non-expert users.
- Keep financial concepts accurate but easy to understand.
- Favor maintainable frontend patterns that fit a product simulation flow.
